subject: fix(nav): fix header vertical alignment and use DaisyUI navbar slots
body:
Asymmetric vertical padding — padding-top was env(safe-area-inset-top)
(0 on non-notch devices) while padding-bottom inherited navbar default
0.5rem, shifting content upward. Fixed by using max(0.5rem, env(...))
for padding-top so non-notch devices get symmetric padding.

Also switched from flex-1/flex-none to navbar-start/navbar-end for
consistent centering via DaisyUI's built-in slot alignment.

Tags: nav, alignment, daisyui
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: css-migration
Semver: patch
